description: Hailing from the hollers of southern Indiana, Stephen Wilson Jr. has taken a winding path to his musical career, making stops as a Golden Gloves boxing finalist, scientist, and indie rock band member before finding his voice as a solo artist. His genre-defying debut double album, søn of dad, cemented him as a force in country and Americana music. The 22-song collection, dedicated to his late father, was named the Best Album of 2023 by Holler and All Country News, and hailed by Rolling Stone as “the most existential release of the year.”
subtitle: USA
title: Stephen Wilson Jr. Concert
